site.title: FRESH Lab
site.tagline: Forest Resources and Ecosystem Services Hub
site.description: FRESH is the Forest Resources and Ecosystem Services Hub at the University of British Columbia.

hero_image.alt: Forest operations site shown as a hybrid photograph, digital wireframe model, and digital twin annotation overlay.

home.eyebrow: UBC Forest Resources and Ecosystem Services Hub
home.title: Forest planning for complex landscapes.
home.summary: FRESH works on modelling forests and natural resources, linking ecosystem services, operations research, carbon, wildfire, landscape planning, and decision support.

start.title: Projects
start.summary: Current work on forest planning, ecosystem services, timber supply, climate, risk, and decision support.

start.summary: Faculty, researchers, students, visiting scholars, and alumni connected to FRESH.

start.title: Publications
start.summary: Recent papers, software, reports, and open-source research outputs.

pages.title: Join FRESH
pages.summary: Current openings and student opportunities will be posted here once they are confirmed.
body: There are no current openings listed on this page.
This page has been cleared of legacy opportunity postings from the previous FRESH site. New lab opportunities will be added after the maintained content model is in place.

pages.title: Contact FRESH
pages.summary: FRESH is the Forest Resources and Ecosystem Services Hub at the University of British Columbia.
body: FRESH is led by Dr. Gregory Paradis in the UBC Faculty of Forestry & Environmental Stewardship.
For current lab information, visit the people page or the FRESH Lab GitHub organization.
